title: Canva Connect API Core Models
description: JSON Schema defining the core data models for the Canva Connect API, including designs, assets, folders, exports, comments, brand templates, and related resources.

Design.description: A Canva design containing visual content across one or more pages

title.description: The display title of the design

created_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the design was created

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the design was last modified

page_count.description: The number of pages in the design. Some design types may not have pages.

Owner.description: The owner of a Canva resource, identified by user and team

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the owning user

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the owning team

DesignUrls.description: Temporary URLs for accessing a design, valid for 30 days

edit_url.description: URL to open the design in the Canva editor (expires in 30 days)

view_url.description: URL to view the design in read-only mode (expires in 30 days)

Thumbnail.description: A thumbnail image representation of a Canva resource. The URL expires after 15 minutes.

url.description: URL to the thumbnail image (expires in 15 minutes)

Asset.description: An uploaded image or video asset in a user's Canva account

type.description: The media type of the asset

name.description: The display name of the asset

tags.description: User-facing tags associated with the asset

created_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the asset was uploaded

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the asset was last modified

ImportStatus.description: The processing status of an imported asset (deprecated)

error.description: Error details if the import failed

Folder.description: A folder for organizing designs and assets in Canva

name.description: The display name of the folder

created_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the folder was created

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the folder was last modified

FolderItem.description: An item contained within a folder, which can be a design, subfolder, or image asset

type.description: The type of the folder item

ExportJob.description: An asynchronous job for exporting a design to a downloadable format such as PDF, PNG, JPG, GIF, PPTX, or MP4

id.description: Unique identifier for the export job

status.description: The current processing status of the export

urls.description: Download URLs for the exported files, one per page. Valid for 24 hours. Present only when status is success.

ExportError.description: Error details for a failed export job

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the failure reason

Comment.description: A comment on a Canva design, either a top-level parent comment or a reply

type.description: Whether this is a top-level comment or a reply

message.description: The comment text. User mentions use the format [user_id:team_id].

created_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the comment was created

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the comment was last updated

assignee.description: The user assigned to resolve this comment (deprecated)

resolver.description: The user who resolved this comment (deprecated)

mentions.description: Dictionary of users mentioned in the comment, keyed by mention identifier

CommentUser.description: A user referenced in a comment (as author, assignee, or resolver)

MentionedUser.description: A user mentioned in a comment message

CommentAttachment.description: The design that a comment is attached to

design_id.description: The ID of the design the comment is attached to

BrandTemplate.description: A Canva brand template that can be used for autofilling designs. Requires Canva Enterprise.

id.description: Unique identifier for the brand template

title.description: The display title of the brand template

view_url.description: URL to view the brand template

create_url.description: URL to create a new design from this brand template

created_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the template was created

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the template was last modified

DatasetField.description: A data field within a brand template dataset, defining what type of content can be autofilled

type.description: The data type this field accepts

TeamUser.description: The authenticated user and their associated Canva team

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the authenticated user

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the user's Canva team

AutofillJob.description: An asynchronous job for creating a design by autofilling a brand template with data

id.description: Unique identifier for the autofill job

result.description: The result of a successful autofill, containing the generated design

error.description: Error details for a failed autofill job

ResizeJob.description: An asynchronous job for resizing a design to new dimensions or a preset type

id.description: Unique identifier for the resize job

result.description: The result of a successful resize, containing the new design

error.description: Error details for a failed resize job

DesignType.description: Specifies the type and dimensions for a new or resized design

PresetDesignType.description: A preset design type such as document, whiteboard, or presentation

CustomDesignType.description: A custom design type with explicit pixel dimensions
